overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded Medjay character holding a torch while walking through an ancient Egyptian village at night. The character moves through a construction site with wooden scaffolding and stone materials, encountering villagers and a horse rider before approaching a large stone step pyramid.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open village outskirts holding a torch, surveying the area ahead

tall wooden scaffolding structure visible in the distance
large stone wall or fortification running along the left side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open village outskirts at night, torch illuminating the path ahead. Mud-brick houses stand in the distance while wooden scaffolding and a stone wall frame the sides of the path. A few villagers are visible walking in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden scaffolding construction area beside stone fortifications

tall wooden watchtower visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a construction zone dominated by large wooden scaffolding structures on the right. The stone wall on the left draws closer while the path leads toward a distant watchtower. The area is devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction yard with stacked timber and rope materials

agents.ego_description: walking past stacked construction logs and wooden crane structures

tall wooden crane structure with rope and pulley system
thick rope coils lying on the ground near the crane
large ancient stone step pyramid visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a construction yard filled with stacked logs on the left and a wooden crane on the right. A large step pyramid becomes visible in the distance ahead. A lone villager walks ahead on the path, and rope coils lie scattered near the crane base.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert approach to step pyramid with scattered palm trees

events.description: horse with rider gallops past on the right side
approaching the base of the large stone step pyramid

agents.ego_description: approaching the pyramid structure while moving past a horse rider and scattered villagers

notable_agents.action: horse with rider galloping past from right to left
guard standing near the stone blocks on the left

entered.detail: tall palm tree with fronds visible against the night sky
ancient stone ruins and blocks scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of a massive step pyramid as a horse and rider gallop past on the right. Palm trees and ancient stone ruins dot the landscape. The torchlight illuminates the sandy path as the character moves closer to the pyramid entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime Egyptian village that transitions from open outskirts into a dense construction zone and finally toward a massive monument. It begins with the character walking past mud-brick houses and stone walls, the torchlight cutting through the dark as distant villagers move along the path. As the camera advances, the environment shifts into a construction area dominated by towering wooden scaffolding and a stone wall that narrows the perspective toward a distant watchtower. The scene then opens into a yard filled with stacked logs and a wooden crane, revealing a large step pyramid looming in the distance while a lone villager walks ahead. Finally, the path leads to the base of the pyramid as a horse and rider gallop past, moving through a landscape of palm trees and stone ruins toward the monument's entrance.
